info.name: Apache Log4j RCE (Log4Shell)
info.description: Apache Log4j2 JNDI lookup allows remote code execution via a crafted request.

info.name: Jenkins Login Panel Exposed
info.description: A Jenkins login panel is reachable without network restriction.

info.name: Missing Security Headers
info.description: The response is missing one or more recommended security headers (CSP, HSTS).

info.name: Weak TLS Cipher Suites Supported
info.description: The server negotiated a cipher suite considered weak.
